2605.29157.title: Parallax: Parameterized Local Linear Attention for Language Modeling
2605.29157.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become the central paradigm in artificial intelligence, yet the core computational primitive of attention has remained structurally unchanged. Local Linear Attention (LLA) is an attention mechanism derived from nonparametric statistics in the test-time regression framework. In contrast to prior research on efficient attention variants, LLA upgrades the local constant estimate in softmax attention to a local linear estimate, yielding provably superior bias-variance tradeoffs for associative memory. However, LLA has not been scaled in LLM pretraining due to computational and numerical stability concerns. We introduce Parallax, a parameterized Local Linear Attention that is scalable for LLMs. Parallax eliminates the numerical solver in LLA and learns an extra query-like projector that probes the KV covariance. We place Parallax within a family of attention mechanisms connected by the bandwidth, the probe construction and the affine structure. We propose a hardware-aware algorithm that increases the arithmetic intensity over FlashAttention, shifting attention into a more compute bound regime. Our prototype decode kernel matches or outperforms FlashAttention 2/3 across diverse batch sizes and context lengths. We pretrain Parallax at 0.6B and 1.7B scales and find consistent perplexity improvements throughout pretraining with gains that transfer to downstream benchmarks. The advantage persists under both parameter-matched and compute-matched controls, demonstrating a Pareto improvement. We perform careful pretraining ablations and identify a novel phenomenon whereby Muon unlocks the capacity of Parallax. To our knowledge, this is the first empirical demonstration of strong architecture-optimizer codesign for attention mechanisms in the architecture research literature.
2605.29157.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）已成為人工智慧的核心範式，但注意力的核心計算原語仍然在結構上保持不變。局部線性注意力（LLA）是一種源自於非參數統計的注意力機制，應用於測試時回歸框架。與先前對高效注意力變體的研究相比，LLA 將 softmax 注意力中的局部常數估計升級為局部線性估計，從而為聯想記憶提供可證明的更優偏差-方差權衡。然而，由於計算和數值穩定性問題，LLA 尚未在 LLM 預訓練中擴展。我們引入 Parallax，一種可擴展的參數化局部線性注意力，適用於 LLM。Parallax 消除了 LLA 中的數值求解器，並學習了一個額外的類查詢投影器，用於探測 KV 協方差。我們將 Parallax 放置在一個由帶寬、探測器構造和仿射結構相連的注意力機制家族中。我們提出了一種硬體感知算法，增加了相較於 FlashAttention 的算術強度，將注意力轉移到更計算密集的範疇。我們的原型解碼內核在不同的批次大小和上下文長度下與 FlashAttention 2/3 匹配或超越。我們在 0.6B 和 1.7B 的規模上預訓練 Parallax，並發現在整個預訓練過程中一致的困惑度改善，這些增益可轉移到下游基準。這一優勢在參數匹配和計算匹配的控制下持續存在，顯示出 Pareto 改進。我們進行了仔細的預訓練消融實驗，並識別出一種新現象，即 Muon 解鎖了 Parallax 的容量。據我們所知，這是架構研究文獻中對注意力機制進行強架構-優化器共同設計的首次實證展示。
2605.29157.author: Yifei Zuo et.al.
2605.29157.authors: Yifei Zuo, Dhruv Pai, Zhichen Zeng, Alec Dewulf, Shuming Hu, Zhaoran Wang
